# Pull Request Checklist

## Summary

<!-- Briefly explain what changed and why. -->

## Related Issue

<!-- Link the relevant issue, for example: Closes #12 -->

## Build / Test Checklist

- [ ] Project opens without errors
- [ ] Code builds and runs locally
- [ ] No new major warnings or runtime errors
- [ ] Relevant tests or manual checks completed
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] New assets are named and stored in the correct folders
- [ ] No copyrighted/protected third-party content has been added
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, tokens, passwords or private credentials committed

## Unreal Checks

- [ ] Blueprints are named clearly and consistently
- [ ] C++ follows `.clang-format` where applicable
- [ ] Large Unreal assets use Git LFS where appropriate
- [ ] The First Storm Demo flow still works if touched

## Screenshots / Evidence

<!-- Add screenshots, logs, or short notes showing the change works. -->
